_meta.failure_shape: v2.13.0 Dynamic affordance discovery — failure mode: agent reviewed a codebase that clearly carries file-upload code (HTML `<input type="file">`, multer middleware, AWS S3 PutObject, 'Upload Document' UI text, react-dropzone import) but produced a requirements inventory that did NOT include `file-upload` in addressed_affordances[]. The agent's review caught most requirements correctly; file-upload silently slipped through.
